response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. There is no evidence of 5-10 years of professional C++ development on Windows, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain background. C++ exposure is limited to a 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis project, which falls well short of the required hands-on C++ depth.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Strong communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching experience
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience — only ~7 months at National Instruments, far below the 5-10 years required
No SQL Server or Oracle experience listed; database work is MongoDB/MySQL-focused
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: Missing financial services / capital markets domain
